tools.name: 20150101.acceptInboundCrossClusterSearchConnection
tools.description: Allows the destination domain owner to accept an inbound cross-cluster search connection request.

tools.name: 20150101.addTags
tools.description: Attaches tags to an existing Elasticsearch domain. Tags are a set of case-sensitive key value pairs. An Elasticsearch domain may have up to 10 tags. See Tagging Amazon Elasticsearch Service Domains for more information.

tools.name: 20150101.associatePackage
tools.description: Associates a package with an Amazon ES domain.

tools.name: 20150101.authorizeVpcEndpointAccess
tools.description: Provides access to an Amazon OpenSearch Service domain through the use of an interface VPC endpoint.

tools.name: 20150101.cancelElasticsearchServiceSoftwareUpdate
tools.description: Cancels a scheduled service software update for an Amazon ES domain. You can only perform this operation before the AutomatedUpdateDate and when the UpdateStatus is in the PENDING_UPDATE state.

tools.name: 20150101.createElasticsearchDomain
tools.description: Creates a new Elasticsearch domain. For more information, see Creating Elasticsearch Domains in the Amazon Elasticsearch Service Developer Guide.

tools.name: 20150101.createOutboundCrossClusterSearchConnection
tools.description: Creates a new cross-cluster search connection from a source domain to a destination domain.

tools.name: 20150101.createPackage
tools.description: Create a package for use with Amazon ES domains.

tools.name: 20150101.createVpcEndpoint
tools.description: Creates an Amazon OpenSearch Service-managed VPC endpoint.

tools.name: 20150101.deleteElasticsearchDomain
tools.description: Permanently deletes the specified Elasticsearch domain and all of its data. Once a domain is deleted, it cannot be recovered.

tools.name: 20150101.deleteElasticsearchServiceRole
tools.description: Deletes the service-linked role that Elasticsearch Service uses to manage and maintain VPC domains. Role deletion will fail if any existing VPC domains use the role. You must delete any such Elasticsearch domains before deleting the role. See Deleting Elasticsearch Service Role in VPC Endpoints for Amazon Elasticsearch Service Domains.

tools.name: 20150101.deleteInboundCrossClusterSearchConnection
tools.description: Allows the destination domain owner to delete an existing inbound cross-cluster search connection.

tools.name: 20150101.deleteOutboundCrossClusterSearchConnection
tools.description: Allows the source domain owner to delete an existing outbound cross-cluster search connection.

tools.name: 20150101.deletePackage
tools.description: Delete the package.

tools.name: 20150101.deleteVpcEndpoint
tools.description: Deletes an Amazon OpenSearch Service-managed interface VPC endpoint.

tools.name: 20150101.describeDomainAutoTunes
tools.description: Provides scheduled Auto-Tune action details for the Elasticsearch domain, such as Auto-Tune action type, description, severity, and scheduled date.

tools.name: 20150101.describeDomainChangeProgress
tools.description: Returns information about the current blue/green deployment happening on a domain, including a change ID, status, and progress stages.

tools.name: 20150101.describeElasticsearchDomain
tools.description: Returns domain configuration information about the specified Elasticsearch domain, including the domain ID, domain endpoint, and domain ARN.

tools.name: 20150101.describeElasticsearchDomainConfig
tools.description: Provides cluster configuration information about the specified Elasticsearch domain, such as the state, creation date, update version, and update date for cluster options.

tools.name: 20150101.describeElasticsearchDomains
tools.description: Returns domain configuration information about the specified Elasticsearch domains, including the domain ID, domain endpoint, and domain ARN.

tools.name: 20150101.describeElasticsearchInstanceTypeLimits
tools.description: Describe Elasticsearch Limits for a given InstanceType and ElasticsearchVersion. When modifying existing Domain, specify the DomainName to know what Limits are supported for modifying.

tools.name: 20150101.describeInboundCrossClusterSearchConnections
tools.description: Lists all the inbound cross-cluster search connections for a destination domain.

tools.name: 20150101.describeOutboundCrossClusterSearchConnections
tools.description: Lists all the outbound cross-cluster search connections for a source domain.

tools.name: 20150101.describePackages
tools.description: Describes all packages available to Amazon ES. Includes options for filtering, limiting the number of results, and pagination.

tools.name: 20150101.describeReservedElasticsearchInstanceOfferings
tools.description: Lists available reserved Elasticsearch instance offerings.

tools.name: 20150101.describeReservedElasticsearchInstances
tools.description: Returns information about reserved Elasticsearch instances for this account.

tools.name: 20150101.describeVpcEndpoints
tools.description: Describes one or more Amazon OpenSearch Service-managed VPC endpoints.

tools.name: 20150101.dissociatePackage
tools.description: Dissociates a package from the Amazon ES domain.

tools.name: 20150101.getCompatibleElasticsearchVersions
tools.description: Returns a list of upgrade compatible Elastisearch versions. You can optionally pass a DomainName to get all upgrade compatible Elasticsearch versions for that specific domain.

tools.name: 20150101.getPackageVersionHistory
tools.description: Returns a list of versions of the package, along with their creation time and commit message.

tools.name: 20150101.getUpgradeHistory
tools.description: Retrieves the complete history of the last 10 upgrades that were performed on the domain.

tools.name: 20150101.getUpgradeStatus
tools.description: Retrieves the latest status of the last upgrade or upgrade eligibility check that was performed on the domain.

tools.name: 20150101.listDomainNames
tools.description: Returns the name of all Elasticsearch domains owned by the current user's account.

tools.name: 20150101.listDomainsForPackage
tools.description: Lists all Amazon ES domains associated with the package.

tools.name: 20150101.listElasticsearchInstanceTypes
tools.description: List all Elasticsearch instance types that are supported for given ElasticsearchVersion

tools.name: 20150101.listElasticsearchVersions
tools.description: List all supported Elasticsearch versions

tools.name: 20150101.listPackagesForDomain
tools.description: Lists all packages associated with the Amazon ES domain.

tools.name: 20150101.listTags
tools.description: Returns all tags for the given Elasticsearch domain.

tools.name: 20150101.listVpcEndpointAccess
tools.description: Retrieves information about each principal that is allowed to access a given Amazon OpenSearch Service domain through the use of an interface VPC endpoint.

tools.name: 20150101.listVpcEndpoints
tools.description: Retrieves all Amazon OpenSearch Service-managed VPC endpoints in the current account and Region.

tools.name: 20150101.listVpcEndpointsForDomain
tools.description: Retrieves all Amazon OpenSearch Service-managed VPC endpoints associated with a particular domain.

tools.name: 20150101.purchaseReservedElasticsearchInstanceOffering
tools.description: Allows you to purchase reserved Elasticsearch instances.

tools.name: 20150101.rejectInboundCrossClusterSearchConnection
tools.description: Allows the destination domain owner to reject an inbound cross-cluster search connection request.

tools.name: 20150101.removeTags
tools.description: Removes the specified set of tags from the specified Elasticsearch domain.

tools.name: 20150101.revokeVpcEndpointAccess
tools.description: Revokes access to an Amazon OpenSearch Service domain that was provided through an interface VPC endpoint.

tools.name: 20150101.startElasticsearchServiceSoftwareUpdate
tools.description: Schedules a service software update for an Amazon ES domain.

tools.name: 20150101.updateElasticsearchDomainConfig
tools.description: Modifies the cluster configuration of the specified Elasticsearch domain, setting as setting the instance type and the number of instances.

tools.name: 20150101.updatePackage
tools.description: Updates a package for use with Amazon ES domains.

tools.name: 20150101.updateVpcEndpoint
tools.description: Modifies an Amazon OpenSearch Service-managed interface VPC endpoint.

tools.name: 20150101.upgradeElasticsearchDomain
tools.description: Allows you to either upgrade your domain or perform an Upgrade eligibility check to a compatible Elasticsearch version.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
